sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65777" key="mela/gkouros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελάγ-κουρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n65777.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">black-haired</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ἀσάφεια</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:122:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">122.4</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l.</abbr> -<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">καρπος</itype>).</sense> </entryFree>
